name: Uganda Integrated Strategic Monitoring System (U-ISMS)
description: U-ISMS is a professional-grade Integrated Strategic Monitoring System designed for high-level geopolitical analysis and operational security theatre management. The platform synchronizes real-time kinetic incident tracking, strategic infrastructure (Asset Ledger) monitoring, and strategic actor (PEP) forensics. Powered by Gemini AI, it delivers automated 'Synthesis Mind' strategic briefings, theater stability matrices, and predictive risk profiling based on deep historical context and real-time field data.
